FAQPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQPage.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products, services, and export capabilities.
FAQPage.ctaText: Can't find what you're looking for?

whatProducts.q: What types of textile chemicals does Grohn Kimya produce?
whatProducts.a: We manufacture a comprehensive range including pre-treatment chemicals (wetting agents, desizing enzymes, sequestering agents), dyeing auxiliaries (levelling agents, pH buffers, dispersing agents), finishing chemicals (silicone softeners, stiffeners), and specialty chemicals for specific textile processes.

exportCountries.q: Which countries do you export to?
exportCountries.a: We export to 30+ countries across Europe, Middle East, North Africa, Central Asia, and South Asia. Our key markets include Germany, Italy, France, Egypt, Morocco, Tunisia, Bangladesh, Pakistan, and Uzbekistan.

minOrder.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
minOrder.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. For most liquid chemicals, the MOQ is 1 IBC (1000 kg). For drum packaging, minimum is typically 200 kg. We can discuss smaller trial quantities for new customers.

sampleAvailable.q: Can I get free samples before ordering?
sampleAvailable.a: Yes! We provide free laboratory samples (1-5 kg) for testing purposes. Our technical team will also provide application guidelines and support during your trials.

deliveryTime.q: What is the typical delivery time?
deliveryTime.a: Standard production and delivery takes 2-3 weeks for stock items. Custom formulations may require 3-4 weeks. We ship via container from Tekirdağ/Istanbul ports with FOB, CIF, and DDP terms available.

customFormulation.a: Absolutely. Our R&D laboratory can develop custom formulations tailored to your specific fabric types, machinery, and process requirements. We also offer on-site technical support for optimization.

certifications.q: What certifications do your products have?
certifications.a: Our products comply with ISO 9001 quality management standards. Select products are OEKO-TEX compatible and GOTS approved. We provide complete SDS (Safety Data Sheets) and TDS (Technical Data Sheets) for all products.

technicalSupport.a: Yes, we offer comprehensive technical support including recipe formulation, process optimization, troubleshooting, and on-site visits. Our R&D team has 15+ years of experience in textile chemistry.
